sum_two_amounts_in_section_value: In the "{section_label}" section, what is "{first_label}" plus "{second_label}"? Use currency notation with exactly two digits after the decimal point.
Using only the "{section_label}" section, add "{first_label}" and "{second_label}". What amount results?
What is the sum of "{first_label}" and "{second_label}" in the "{section_label}" section?
Read the "{section_label}" section and compute "{first_label}" plus "{second_label}".
Find "{first_label}" and "{second_label}" in "{section_label}" and compute their total amount.
difference_two_amounts_in_section_value: In the "{section_label}" section, what is "{first_label}" minus "{second_label}"? Use currency notation with exactly two digits after the decimal point.
Using only the "{section_label}" section, subtract "{second_label}" from "{first_label}". What amount results?
What is the difference "{first_label}" minus "{second_label}" in the "{section_label}" section?
Read the "{section_label}" section and compute "{first_label}" minus "{second_label}".
Find "{first_label}" and "{second_label}" in "{section_label}" and compute the resulting difference.
ranked_amount_field_label: In the "{section_label}" section, which field label has the {rank_phrase} amount?
Using only the "{section_label}" section, find the field with the {rank_phrase} currency amount. What is its field label?
What field label corresponds to the {rank_phrase} amount in the "{section_label}" section?
Read the currency fields in "{section_label}" and identify the label for the {rank_phrase} amount.
Among the amounts in "{section_label}", which field label is attached to the {rank_phrase} amount?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:sum_two_amounts_in_section_value.object_description: a structured document with visible section headers and labeled currency fields
query:sum_two_amounts_in_section_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the computed amount formatted as a currency string with exactly two digits after the decimal point
query:sum_two_amounts_in_section_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "first_operand" and "second_operand" to the referenced operand field boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], including each field label and value

query:difference_two_amounts_in_section_.object_description: a structured document with visible section headers and labeled currency fields
query:difference_two_amounts_in_section_.answer_hint: set "answer" to the computed amount formatted as a currency string with exactly two digits after the decimal point
query:difference_two_amounts_in_section_.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "first_operand" and "second_operand" to the referenced operand field boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], including each field label and value

query:ranked_amount_field_label.object_description: a structured document with visible section headers and labeled currency fields
query:ranked_amount_field_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact field label string
query:ranked_amount_field_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the selected field row box [x0, y0, x1, y1], including its label and value
